chunks.text: Welcome to the Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences at UC Berkeley. Our top-ranked programs attract stellar students and professors from around the world, who pioneer the frontiers of information science and technology with broad impact on society. Underlying our success are a strong tradition of collaboration, close ties to industry, and a supportive culture. Explore our vibrant and dynamic community through this website or in person.
chunks.question: What is the Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences at UC Berkeley known for?

chunks.text: Eric Paulos elected to the ACM CHI Academy. Sprawling new painting commemorates 150 years of women at UC Berkeley. Aditi Krishnapriyan receives Department of Energy Early Career Award. Tyler Hou named 2026 Hertz Fellowship Finalist. Three UC Berkeley EECS faculty named 2026 Sloan Fellows. In Memoriam: Beresford Parlett (1932–2026). Three Berkeley Engineering professors named to NAE. AI research deluge: why one conference is asking authors to rank their own papers. Wentao Xu receives the Piezo MEMS Design Challenge Innovation Award. TechCrunch: A peek inside Physical Intelligence, the startup building Silicon Valley’s buzziest robot brains. Lensless imaging redefined by information theory. CRA Outstanding Undergraduate Researcher Award recognizes EECS. Sylvia Ratnasamy named 2025 ACM Fellow. The 2025 EECS Distinguished Alumni. UC Berkeley ranked #1 in data science and #2 in computer science by U.S. News. UC Berkeley EECS announces the Vigyan Singhal Fund for Chip Design Education. EECS researchers develop a scalable quantum platform for high-speed communications. Guiding Berkeley’s largest academic department into new territory.
chunks.question: What recent achievements and recognitions are highlighted for UC Berkeley EECS?

chunks.text: We offer one of the most comprehensive research and instructional programs in this field anywhere in the world. Graduate Admissions and Programs. Undergraduate Admissions and Programs. Courses. The research developed here is part of a tradition of outstanding scholarship and visionary innovation. Areas. Centers and Labs. Technical Reports. Our faculty, students, staff and alumni are central to our success as one of the most thriving and distinguished departments on the Berkeley campus. EECS Directory. Faculty. Students. Alumni.
chunks.question: What academic and research opportunities does EECS at Berkeley provide?
chunks.answer: Comprehensive programs and innovative research areas.

chunks.answer: Seminars and talks on various tech topics.
